examples: A drawer may specify himself on a cheque as the payee.
Direct debit: preauthorised debit on the payer's bank account initiated by the payee.
Inward Remittance Inward Remittance means the overseas remitter remits the funds to the payee.
Whether you are payee or payor, you need a system to record and track these information returns.
And just like a form 1099-MISC or 1099-DIV, those statements also need to be furnished to the payee.
